mapper.insert: insert into im_user_room_inbox( user_id, room_id, last_seq, last_message_id, last_from_user_id, last_content, last_message_created_at, last_read_seq, unread_count, sort_at ) select m.user_id, m.room_id, #{seq}, #{messageId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, case when m.user_id = #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY} then #{seq} else coalesce(s.last_read_seq, 0) end, case when m.user_id = #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY} then 0 else greatest(0, #{seq} - coalesce(s.last_read_seq, 0)) end, #{createdAt} from im_room_member m left join im_room_read_state s on s.room_id = m.room_id and s.user_id = m.user_id where m.room_id = #{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY} and not exists ( select 1 from im_user_room_inbox i where i.user_id = m.user_id and i.room_id = m.room_id )
mapper.update: update im_user_room_inbox set unread_count = case when user_id = #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY} then 0 else greatest(0, unread_count + (#{seq} - last_seq)) end, last_read_seq = case when user_id = #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY} then greatest(last_read_seq, #{seq}) else last_read_seq end, last_seq = #{seq}, last_message_id = #{messageId, jdbcType=BINARY}, last_from_user_id = #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, last_content = #{content}, last_message_created_at = #{createdAt}, sort_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where room_id = #{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY} and #{seq} > last_seq
mapper.insert: insert into im_user_room_inbox( user_id, room_id, last_seq, last_message_id, last_from_user_id, last_content, last_message_created_at, last_read_seq, unread_count, sort_at ) values ( #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{lastSeq}, #{lastMessageId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{lastFromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{lastContent}, #{lastMessageCreatedAt}, #{lastReadSeq}, #{unreadCount}, #{sortAt} )
mapper.update: update im_user_room_inbox set last_seq = greatest(last_seq, #{lastSeq}), last_read_seq = greatest(last_read_seq, #{lastReadSeq}), unread_count = greatest(0, greatest(last_seq, #{lastSeq}) - greatest(last_read_seq, #{lastReadSeq})), updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and room_id = #{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY}
mapper.insert: insert into im_user_conversation_inbox( user_id, conversation_id, peer_user_id, last_seq, last_message_id, last_from_user_id, last_to_user_id, last_content, last_message_created_at, last_read_seq, unread_count, sort_at ) values ( #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{conversationId}, #{peerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{seq}, #{messageId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{toUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{lastReadSeq}, #{unreadCount}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: update im_user_conversation_inbox set peer_user_id = #{peerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, last_seq = greatest(last_seq, #{seq}), last_message_id = case when #{seq} >= last_seq then #{messageId, jdbcType=BINARY} else last_message_id end, last_from_user_id = case when #{seq} >= last_seq then #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY} else last_from_user_id end, last_to_user_id = case when #{seq} >= last_seq then #{toUserId, jdbcType=BINARY} else last_to_user_id end, last_content = case when #{seq} >= last_seq then #{content} else last_content end, last_message_created_at = case when #{seq} >= last_seq then #{createdAt} else last_message_created_at end, last_read_seq = greatest(last_read_seq, #{lastReadSeq}), unread_count = case when #{seq} <= last_seq then unread_count when #{senderRow} then 0 else greatest(0, unread_count + (#{seq} - last_seq)) end, sort_at = case when #{seq} >= last_seq then #{createdAt} else sort_at end, updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and conversation_id = #{conversationId}
